name: Ansar al-Sahel
composite_of: Composite closely modeled on JNIM and its precursors (Ansar Dine, AQIM's Saharan katibas, MUJAO, Katiba Macina). Locally rooted, federated structure, shadow-governance playbook.
notes: The entrenchment-first antagonist: embeds in local disputes, taxes routes, runs shadow courts. Rivalry with wilayat_sahel is real but historically punctuated by truces of convenience — unlike-group linking must stay possible (DESIGN §5.2).

name: Wilayat Sahel
composite_of: Composite closely modeled on IS-Sahel (ex-ISGS) and ISWAP influence at the arc's edges. Transnational franchise logic, higher-tempo violence, weaker local rooting.
notes: The strength-first antagonist: louder, more visible, less survivable under pressure — the contrast faction that makes the Strength/Entrenchment/Visibility triad legible in play.
